title: Retro-orbital Bleeding for Rats
steps: Take a microcapillary tube (broken in half) and place it behind the eye.
Twist it until you hear/feel a little pop, and blood should start coming out.
Let blood drip into the purple collection tube (try to fill it to the top line).
Once you complete the collection, remove the microcapillary tube and clean the eye with a cotton tip applicator and/or gauze.
Put the cap on the tube, and slowly flip tube up and down so the blood goes on all sides of the tube (prevents it from clotting).
creator: Molly Brennan
